## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is it for — a Speaker or an Organizer?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Fit with the project

- [ ] Works within the **free-tier** constraints (no Cloud Functions, etc.)
- [ ] Can be gated behind a Remote Config flag
- [ ] Considered for EN + ES

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or references.
